on_screen_text: हजारो रुपये खर्च केले कोचिंग क्लासेसवर - तरीही English बोलता येत नाही 😭 [Spent thousands of rupees on coaching classes - still can't speak English 😭] MySivi वर ₹3/- trial - आता मी Pro सारखं English बोलतो 😎 [₹3/- trial on MySivi - now I speak English like a Pro 😎]
summary: This Marathi meme-style ad contrasts the frustration of wasting money on expensive English coaching classes with the success of using MySivi. It features a split-screen of Amitabh Bachchan crying versus looking confident to promote a 3-rupee trial.
